description.en: List all Workers scripts in your Cloudflare account.
description.de: Alle Workers-Skripte in Ihrem Cloudflare-Konto auflisten.

vars.API_TOKEN: env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN|Get your API token from Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens.
vars.ACCOUNT_ID: env:CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID|Your Cloudflare Account ID from the dashboard overview page.
